ddls:
CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the television series */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the series (e.g., Drama, Comedy) */,
  "premiere_date" TEXT /* Date when the series premiered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the series (e.g., Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the series */,
  "total_seasons" INTEGER /* Number of seasons planned or produced */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary producer of the series */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the series entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the series entry was last updated */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_production_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series it belongs to */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number of the episode */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number within the season */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Air date of the episode */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the episode in minutes */,
  "script_writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary script writer */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary director */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Cost incurred for producing the episode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the episode entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the episode entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_script_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address for the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the director */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the director */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the director entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the director entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the writer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address for the writer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the writer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the writer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the writer entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the writer entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_credits" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director for the episode */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer for the episode */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the director or writer in the episode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the credit entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the credit entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_credits_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_credits_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_credits_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode being rated */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value given by the audience (e.g., from 1 to 10) */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the episode */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewership" (
  "viewership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewership entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the episode */,
  "average_watch_time" INTEGER /* Average watch time in minutes */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the episode was viewed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the viewership entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the viewership entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewership_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotional_materials" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotional material */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "promo_type" TEXT /* Type of promotional material (e.g., Trailer, Behind-the-scenes) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the promotional material */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the promotional material was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the promotional material */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the promotional material is available */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the promotional material entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the promotional material entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotional_materials_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the production company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the production company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the production company entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the production company entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode covered by the contract */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production company involved */,
  "contract_terms" TEXT /* Terms of the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Financial value of the contract */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contract entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contract entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the production team */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the feedback was provided */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
